calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-20-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Feb-04-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Cause call for prove-up hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: Marjorie Schwartz-Scott, CSR: Ron Sinclair
Counsel: Roderick Paul Bushnell present with Plaintiff: Samuel R. Sandigo
Plaintiff was sworn and examined.
After evidence and testimony was heard, the court grants judgment for Plaintiff and against defendant: Carrie Denise Butler.
Plaintiff agrees to file written dismissal as to Defendant: Krystal S. Willingham
Matter is submitted. Counsel to prepare proposed judgment.
Court takes this matter under submission.

Feb. 4, 2004
The Court grants Judgment for Plaintiff: Samuel R. Sandigo against Defendant: Carrie Denise Butler as follows: Damages $31,159.45, costs $269.50 for a total of $31,428.95, and interest at the rate of 10% per annum from the date of the Judgment.
Judgment signed.
